response.justification: Candidate demonstrates strong foundational engineering skills with 20 years of diverse experience across multiple domains and technologies, meeting the minimum 15-year requirement. However, there is a significant gap between the role's core focus on AI strategy and recognized AI expertise. The candidate's AI experience is limited to very recent work on AI-agent infrastructure (2 months at current role), with no demonstrated track record of building AI products, platforms, or established thought leadership in AI/ML. While they show capacity to learn new domains and mentor others, they lack the advanced degree in AI, startup experience, and recognized AI expertise that are critical for a director-level principal engineer in AI strategy.
strengths: 20+ years of proven software engineering experience across web, mobile, desktop, and infrastructure—exceeds minimum requirement and demonstrates ability to master multiple technology domains

Established thought leader and mentor with track record of inspiring technical growth through workshops, talks, and open-source contributions (GISCollective), showing communication skills needed for advising customers and partners
Demonstrates strong engineering fundamentals with documented commitment to testing, CI/CD, and software craftsmanship practices across organizations
concerns: Minimal demonstrated AI/ML expertise—only 2 months of AI-agent infrastructure work at current role, no products built with AI, no publications or recognized authority in AI domain
Lacks advanced degree in AI/ML field (preferred qualification); background is primarily full-stack web and infrastructure engineering without formal AI training or coursework

No evidence of director-level principal engineer experience; currently Staff Engineer role, and past positions are senior IC without demonstrated strategic technical leadership at the level required for this role

key_factors.factor: AI/ML expertise and product track record
Extensive general software engineering experience (20 years)
Lack of advanced degree in AI-related field
